mapper.select: SELECT CART_SN, USER_ID, PROD_DIV_CD, PROD_SN, PROD_NM, PROD_PRICE, ITEM_QTY, REG_DT FROM CART WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_442698".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CART (CART_SN, USER_ID, PROD_DIV_CD, PROD_SN, PROD_NM, PROD_PRICE, ITEM_QTY, REG_DT) VALUES ( "TEAM1_202512AF"."ISEQ$$_442698".NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{prodDivCd}, #{prodSn}, #{prodNm}, #{prodPrice}, NVL(#{itemQty}, 1), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
